_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PANEL
name: Windrose
author: Styxbleich@users.noreply.github.com
description:
Windrose Dedicated Server (Early Access) PvE co-op pirate survival on Unreal Engine 5. The dedicated server binary is Windows-only and runs via Proton on Linux. Files are installed anonymously via SteamCMD (App ID 4129620).
Players connect using an invite code shown in the server console, NOT by IP:port. After startup, share the InviteCode with your crew: Play Connect to Server paste code. 12 GB (4-player).
SSD storage strongly recommended (server uses RocksDB for world saves).

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# Windrose Dedicated Server — Pelican Install Script
# Author: Styxbleich
# Based on parkervcp/pelican-eggs SteamCMD Proton pattern
#
# Server Files: /mnt/server
# Install image: ghcr.io/parkervcp/installers:debian

## Set Steam credentials — anonymous for Windrose
if [[ "${STEAM_USER}" == "" ]] || [[ "${STEAM_PASS}" == "" ]]; then
    echo -e "Steam user not set — using anonymous login."
    STEAM_USER=anonymous
    STEAM_PASS=""
    STEAM_AUTH=""
else
    echo -e "Steam user: ${STEAM_USER}"
fi

## Download and install SteamCMD
cd /tmp
mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamcmd
curl -sSL -o steamcmd.tar.gz https://steamcdn-a.akamaihd.net/client/installer/steamcmd_linux.tar.gz
tar -xzvf steamcmd.tar.gz -C /mnt/server/steamcmd

mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamapps
cd /mnt/server/steamcmd

# SteamCMD requires root ownership and HOME set
chown -R root:root /mnt
export HOME=/mnt/server

## Install Windrose Dedicated Server
## +@sSteamCmdForcePlatformType windows is critical —
## tells SteamCMD to pull the Windows binary (no Linux build exists)
./steamcmd.sh \
  +force_install_dir /mnt/server \
  +login ${STEAM_USER} ${STEAM_PASS} ${STEAM_AUTH} \
  +@sSteamCmdForcePlatformType windows \
  +app_update 4129620 $( [[ -z ${SRCDS_BETAID} ]] || printf %s "-beta ${SRCDS_BETAID}" ) $( [[ -z ${SRCDS_BETAPASS} ]] || printf %s "-betapassword ${SRCDS_BETAPASS}" ) validate \
  +quit

## Set up Steam SDK libraries
mkdir -p /mnt/server/.steam/sdk32
cp -v linux32/steamclient.so /mnt/server/.steam/sdk32/steamclient.so

mkdir -p /mnt/server/.steam/sdk64
cp -v linux64/steamclient.so /mnt/server/.steam/sdk64/steamclient.so

## Write default ServerDescription.json if not present
## Pelican's JSON parser will apply variable values on each startup.
## We pre-create it so the parser has a file to work with from first boot.
CONFIG_FILE="/mnt/server/R5/ServerDescription.json"
mkdir -p /mnt/server/R5

if [ ! -f "${CONFIG_FILE}" ]; then
  echo "[Windrose] Writing default ServerDescription.json..."
  cat > "${CONFIG_FILE}" << 'JSEOF'
{
  "Version": 1,
  "ServerDescription_Persistent": {
    "PersistentServerId": "",
    "InviteCode": "server01",
    "IsPasswordProtected": false,
    "Password": "",
    "ServerName": "Windrose Server",
    "WorldIslandId": "",
    "MaxPlayerCount": 4,
    "P2pProxyAddress": "127.0.0.1"
  }
}
JSEOF
fi

## Verify install
if [ -f "/mnt/server/R5/Binaries/Win64/WindroseServer-Win64-Shipping.exe" ]; then
  echo "-----------------------------------------"
  echo "Windrose install complete!"
  echo "App ID 4129620 | anonymous | Windows binary"
  echo "-----------------------------------------"
else
  echo "-----------------------------------------"
  echo "WARNING: WindroseServer-Win64-Shipping.exe not found."
  echo "SteamCMD may have failed. Try reinstalling."
  echo "-----------------------------------------"
  exit 1
fi

variables.name: [SERVER] Invite Code
variables.description: Code players paste to connect. Min 6 chars, alphanumeric, case sensitive.

variables.name: [SERVER] Password Protected
variables.description: Set to true to require a password to join, false for open access.

variables.name: [SERVER] Max Players
variables.description: Max simultaneous players. Developers recommend 4 or fewer for Early Access stability.

variables.name: [SERVER] Server Name
variables.description: The display name of your server shown in ServerDescription.json

variables.name: [SERVER] Server Password
variables.description: Password to join the server. Only used if Password Protected is true.

variables.name: [STEAM] Steam App ID
variables.description: App ID for Windrose Dedicated Server

variables.name: [STEAM] Beta Branch ID
variables.description: Name of the beta branch to install. Leave empty for the default stable branch.

variables.name: [STEAM] Beta Branch Password
variables.description: Password for the beta branch, if required. Leave empty if not needed.

variables.name: Update on Start
variables.description: Set to 1 to check for updates via SteamCMD on every start. Set to 0 to skip.

variables.name: [WORLD] World Name
variables.description: Informational only — changing this value does not automatically rename your world. To rename an existing world, stop the server and edit the WorldName field in WorldDescription.json at R5/Saved/SaveProfiles/Default/RocksDB/<version>/Worlds/<worldId>/WorldDescription.json, then restart.

variables.name: [WORLD] World Preset Type
variables.description: Informational only — changing this value does not automatically update your world difficulty. Valid presets are Easy, Medium, and Hard. To change an existing world, stop the server and edit WorldPresetType in WorldDescription.json at R5/Saved/SaveProfiles/Default/RocksDB/<version>/Worlds/<worldId>/WorldDescription.json. Note that once a world has been played, the preset label has no effect on the stored WorldSettings parameters — those must be edited individually. See https://playwindrose.com/dedicated-server-guide/#wsg-worlddesc for the full parameter reference.
